title: Sign of the Gladiator
director: Guido Brignone, Michelangelo Antonioni, Riccardo Freda
writer: Francesco Thellung, Francesco De Feo, Sergio Leone
actors: Anita Ekberg, Georges Marchal, Folco Lulli
plot: Zenobia, Queen of Palmyra, revolts against Rome and defeats the Roman troops - but she makes a big mistake when she falls in love with enemy officer Marco Valerio.
